reasons: Full regression baseline passed from restored execution history.
2 confirmed MFA product defect(s) require resolution before approval.

blockers.name: MFA backup codes generated in incomplete format are rejected during login recovery
blockers.reason: Users may be unable to recover access with backup codes if they lose authenticator access.

blockers.name: Google-authenticated users are asked for password when regenerating backup codes or disabling 2FA
blockers.reason: Google-authenticated users may be unable to manage or recover MFA settings without admin/support intervention.

requiredActions: Review backup-code generation, download/export formatting, storage validation, and MFA challenge validation rules so generated codes match the accepted login format.
Update MFA management confirmation for OAuth users to use an OAuth-safe verification method, such as recent login, TOTP confirmation, email verification, or step-up authentication.
release.recommendedAction: Resolve confirmed MFA defects, then rerun the affected MFA scenarios before release approval.
release.explanation: AIR recommends NO GO because the restored 69-test regression passed, but 2 confirmed MFA product defect(s) remain open.

source.note: AIR reused the strongest valid execution snapshot because the available Playwright output was missing or older than history.

reasons: Full regression baseline passed from restored execution history.
2 confirmed MFA product defect(s) require resolution before approval.

blockers.name: MFA backup codes generated in incomplete format are rejected during login recovery
blockers.reason: Users may be unable to recover access with backup codes if they lose authenticator access.

blockers.name: Google-authenticated users are asked for password when regenerating backup codes or disabling 2FA
blockers.reason: Google-authenticated users may be unable to manage or recover MFA settings without admin/support intervention.

requiredActions: Review backup-code generation, download/export formatting, storage validation, and MFA challenge validation rules so generated codes match the accepted login format.
Update MFA management confirmation for OAuth users to use an OAuth-safe verification method, such as recent login, TOTP confirmation, email verification, or step-up authentication.
release.recommendedAction: Resolve confirmed MFA defects, then rerun the affected MFA scenarios before release approval.
release.explanation: AIR recommends NO GO because the restored 69-test regression passed, but 2 confirmed MFA product defect(s) remain open.
